description: Timewear from giordano has an elegant contemporary look and advanced Japanese movements, seamlessly blended with classic, timeless designs. A piece designed for modern life but remaining true to its heritage. Case diameter: 36 mm Case thickness: 12 mm Dial shape: Gold Warranty: 1 Year Stainless steel case with crystal encrusted bezel for durability, style and comfort Leather strap with a tang clasp Off white dial with analogue display crystals for numbering Screw to reset time and alarm Solid case back for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 100 meters -wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing.Warranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
